html:
The highly anticipated Octane OC 2023 High Tech Awards are on Thursday, September 21st in Irvine, CA. This prestigious award show brings together the very best in technology to honor the innovation and excellence of game-changing individuals and companies.

During the selection process, the HTA Committee of industry experts and thought leaders sifted through an impressive group of nominees across 10 categories. Revolv3 is honored to be chosen as a finalist for the “Best Enterprise or B2B Technology Innovation” category. To see Revolv3 and the complete list of 2023 finalists, click here.

As stated in Octane OC’s finalist announcement, “At Octane, we are dedicated to showcasing and honoring the remarkable achievements of the brightest minds in the industry. Today, we proudly unveil the exceptional companies and individuals who have pushed the boundaries of innovation and made an indelible impact on the world of technology.”

The award ceremony will be hosted at AV Irvine. Tickets and tables are available here.
